The fix is complete. Here's a summary of what was wrong and what was done:

**Root cause:** `/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/index.ts` had a static `indexHTML` string with `<script type="module" src="/__bundle/main.js">` — an absolute path. When the browser loads `labs.clung.us/commons-v2/`, it resolves that absolute path to `labs.clung.us/__bundle/main.js` (no lab prefix), which the labs router correctly returns 404 for (no lab named `__bundle`).

**Fix:** Converted the static `indexHTML` string ...(truncated)
